metadata.name: skills_example
metadata.description: Developer reference template demonstrating agent skill composition: file reading, analysis, and output formatting skills in sequence

data.task: Read the input file using filesystem skills. Identify the file type and extract all content. Demonstrate: file reading skill, format detection skill
Analyze the parsed content: extract key entities, summarize sections, identify structure. Demonstrate: text analysis skill, entity extraction skill, summarization skill

Transform the analysis into the requested output format. For markdown: structured report. For json: typed data. For table: columnar format. Demonstrate: format transformation skill, output composition skill. Include a skills_used manifest listing each skill invoked
